auditor: operador-manual (GGA credits exhausted, audit manual consolidado)

G1_reversibilidad.notes: Tier B: FileSnapshot reuse del mechanic para rollback. Tier C: solo crea archivos nuevos (no modifica existentes). Pipeline: delegación pura, no modifica archivos directamente.

G3_errores_nunca_silenciosos.notes: Tier B: except con raise RuntimeError from exc en llm_client + escalation en orchestrator. Tier C: errors logged a stderr JSON. Pipeline: propagación de errores de handlers.

G4_zero_trust_boundaries.notes: Tier B: _validate_findings en cli.py (required keys + type check). Tier C: _validate_findings en cli.py. Pipeline: delegates validation to sub-handlers.

G5_funciones_50_lineas.notes: Tier B: _process_one refactored to ~40 LOC with _check_skip, _call_llm, _apply_and_verify extracted. Tier C: draft_one ~30 LOC. Pipeline: dispatch ~35 LOC.

G6_logs_estructurados.notes: Todos usan JSON structured logging via print() a stderr. Advisory: migrar a stdlib logging con JSON formatter cuando framework madure.
G6_logs_estructurados.advisory: A1 — print() vs logging module (cosmético, no funcional)

G7_invariantes.notes: Todos los models son frozen dataclasses. Enums con str base para serialización.

SOLID_SRP.notes: Tier B: 10 modules con responsabilidad única cada uno. Tier C: 6 modules. Pipeline: 4 modules.

SOLID_DIP.notes: Tier B: Protocol-based DI (LLMClient → AnthropicClient / MockLLMClient). Pipeline: accepts LLM client as parameter.

ZERO_TRUST.notes: Input validation at CLI boundaries. Template loading validates schema. Context loading validates required fields.

FG_IDEMPOTENCY.notes: Tier B: check_pattern before LLM call (skip if already fixed). Tier C: glob for existing ADR before creating. Pipeline: delegates to sub-handlers.

FG_ATOMICITY.notes: Tier B: FileSnapshot per finding (1 failure doesn't abort batch). Tier C: file creation is atomic (write or don't). Pipeline: sequential processing.

details.desc: CWE links present for security rules
Multiple Tier C in one batch

summary.paso_8_verdict: PASS (19/23 adversarial categories tested; 4 deferred require real LLM)
advisories: A1: print() JSON → stdlib logging (cosmético, framework-wide cuando madure)
A2: 4 adversariales Tier B no testeables sin LLM real (cats 9-12)
A3: cross-module import FileSnapshot desde auto_fix_mechanic (promover a API publica)
